title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following factors that influence people's food choices, then decide which two have the greatest influence on what people eat today.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some factors that can influence people's food choices.
Now decide which two factors have the greatest influence on what people choose to eat today.
